extract: Nuvema Town (Japanese: カノコタウン Kanoko Town) is a small town located in southeastern Unova. It is the hometown of the player in Pokémon Black and White. It is also the hometown of Cheren and Bianca—the rivals of the player in Pokémon Black and White, and the Gym Leader of the Aspertia Gym and Professor Juniper's assistant, respectively, in Pokémon Black 2 and White 2. The Juniper Pokémon Lab, where Professor Juniper is based, is located in the town. The town has only one exit; to the north is Route 1, leading to Accumula Town. In Pokémon Black and White, after Alder has been defeated, Bianca can be found in the town on weekends, challenging the player to a rematch once a day.
